name: Saul Centers Inc. Depositary shares each representing a 1/100th fractional interest in a share of 6.000% Series E Cumulative Redeemable Preferred Stock
summary: Saul Centers Inc. Depositary Shares represent fractional interests in shares of their preferred stock, specifically the 6.000% Series E Cumulative Redeemable Preferred Stock. Saul Centers is a REIT (Real Estate Investment Trust) focused on owning and operating community and neighborhood shopping centers. The company is based in Bethesda, Maryland.
